steps.title: Identify what 'accelerated germination' requires
steps.content: The passage says “accelerated germination” — meaning treated seeds germinated faster than untreated ones. To demonstrate this effect, the statement must compare H₂S-treated and untreated seeds at the same time point, with treated seeds showing higher germination percentages.

steps.title: Match the comparison that demonstrates acceleration
steps.content: At 48 hours, H₂S-treated seeds at 10 micromoles per liter show more than 70% germination, while untreated seeds are at only about 50%, demonstrating that treatment accelerated germination. Choice A lacks a treated-untreated comparison, C shows only the endpoint, and D doesn't match the data. That matches choice B — B is correct.
